author: zgfdada
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Automatically create corresponding Obsidian daily notes based on the created date in the note's frontmatter.

manifest.author: zgfdada
manifest.description: Create missing daily notes from frontmatter created dates.
manifest.name: Created Daily Note Sync

name: Created Daily Note Sync

releases.author: zgfdada
releases.description:
﻿Initial public release.

Assets for Obsidian installation:

- manifest.json

This plugin creates missing daily notes from Markdown frontmatter created dates.
